decision_commentary: Completeness 4: all required fields present — rfc (TEST-RFC-004), revenue_amount (216,000), tax_jurisdiction ('Mexico — IVA 16%'), filing_period ('2027-06'), cfdi_reference ('[CFDI — TO BE GENERATED BY ACCOUNTANT]'), deductibles (array with 1 item). Docking to 4 because deductibles documentation is incomplete — the deductible item has amount=0 with a note that 'amounts to be confirmed with accountant based on final engineer invoices.' The rubric requires deductibles documented; this is partially documented (structure present, amounts unknown). Acceptable in test context but noted. Accuracy 5: revenue_amount=216,000 matches invoice.json running_total=216,000 exactly. Tax jurisdiction 'Mexico — IVA 16%' matches state.json tax_jurisdiction. Filing period 2027-06 matches the month of project close (COFEPRIS approval 2027-06-02). dispatched_at 2027-06-02 same day as permit approval. Clarity 4: cfdi_reference is a placeholder ('[CFDI — TO BE GENERATED BY ACCOUNTANT]') — not a real CFDI reference; cannot be traced to Controller invoices in production. Acceptable for test run but noted. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: filed within filing_period 2027-06 after project close 2027-06-02. Auto-fail: revenue amount matches Controller total — PASS; RFC present — PASS; filing not incomplete — PASS (all fields present, some placeholders); correct tax jurisdiction — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia gate for tax-filing. Tax fires after Controller dispatches.
gaps: cfdi_reference is a placeholder — not traceable to Controller invoices in production. Deductible amounts pending accountant confirmation.
